positive: A detailed illustration of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) perched atop a geometric crescent moon. The fox has flowing, vibrant tails and eyes that emit soft starlight. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, featuring bold, flowing outlines and intricate line work reminiscent of Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock prints. The background is an abstract watercolor wash of deep indigo, twilight purple, and gold leaf accents. The overall mood is magical, serene, and mystical. Perfect for apparel print, high contrast, vector art quality, flat graphic design style.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, low resolution, photographic, realistic, complex shadows
